ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date when the meeting took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the board member who conducted the meeting */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the meeting was held virtually */,
  "zoom_link" TEXT /* Zoom link for virtual meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division associated with the position */,
  "is_leadership" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the position is a leadership role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_positions" (
  "member_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a member and a position */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the board member */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the board member started holding the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the board member stopped holding the position (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, board member) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
